US: US1: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats, so that I can respond faster and maintain consistency in my communication without typing the same messages repeatedly
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to Inbox conversation
3. Verify Editor nav
Title: Saved Responses button next to GIF button
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to GIF button

Step:
4. Hover over Saved Responses button
5. Verify tooltip
Title: tooltip shows Saved Responses
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip Saved Responses

Step:
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify modal
Title: modal displayed on click
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal

Step:
3. Press Ctrl/Cmd + K
4. Verify modal
Title: modal displayed via shortcut
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal when pressing Ctrl/Cmd + K

Title: X button in top corner
Expectation: - SHOULD display X button in top corner

Title: Search box displayed
Expectation: - SHOULD display Search box

Title: Create new button in top-right corner
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create new button in top-right corner

Step:
5. Hover over Create new button
6. Verify tooltip
Title: Create New tooltip on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create New tooltip when hovering

Step: 5. Verify empty state
Title: empty list message when no saved responses
Expectation: - SHOULD display Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats.

Step: 5. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section
Title: hide FREQUENTLY USED when no usage
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section when no frequently used saved responses exist

Step: 5. Verify saved responses list
Title: list displayed on left side
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of saved response titles on left side below Search box

Title: list ordered by latest updated time
Expectation: - SHOULD order saved responses by latest updated time

Step: 6. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section
Title: top 5 most-used responses shown
Expectation: - SHOULD show top 5 most-used saved responses by usage_count descending

Title: fewer than 5 responses shown
Expectation: - SHOULD show all available responses when fewer than 5

Title: sort by usage_count desc then title A-Z
Expectation: - SHOULD sort by usage_count descending, then by title ascending when usage_count is equal

Step: 6. Verify ALL section
Title: all responses sorted by title A-Z
Expectation: - SHOULD list all saved responses sorted by title A-Z in ALL section

Step: 7. Verify default selection
Title: first saved response selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first saved response in the list by default

Step:
8. Press Up/Down arrow keys
9. Verify selection moves
Title: arrow keys navigate between responses
Expectation: - SHOULD allow user to move between responses using Up and Down arrow keys

Step: 8. Verify right-side detail panel
Title: message detail of selected response
Expectation: - SHOULD display title and message detail of current-selecting saved response on right side

Step:
9. Hover over message detail
10. Verify 3-dot button
Title: 3-dot button on hover message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button when hovering over message detail

Step: 9. Verify long message scrolling
Title: scrollable message detail when long
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling if the message is long

Step:
9. Hover between saved response titles
10. Verify message detail updates
Title: message detail updates on title hover
Expectation: - SHOULD update message detail when hovering between titles of saved-responses list

Step: 9. Verify pagination
Title: load 20 items initially
Expectation: - SHOULD load every 20 items

Step:
10. Scroll down to bottom
11. Verify Load more button
Title: Load more displayed on scroll
Expectation: - SHOULD display Load more and get next 20 items when user scrolls down

Step: 10. Verify footer shortcuts
Title: footer shows list of shortcuts
Expectation: - SHOULD show list of shortcuts in footer

Step:
11. Click X button
12. Verify modal closes
Title: X button closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the modal when clicking X button

Step:
11. Press Esc key
12. Verify modal closes
Title: Esc key closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the modal when pressing Esc key

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to Inbox conversation
3. Open Saved Responses popup
4. Verify Search box
Title: empty by default with placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty Search box with placeholder Search saved response

Step:
5. Focus on Search box
6. Verify placeholder changes
Title: placeholder changes to Enter keyword...
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to Enter keyword... when focused

Step:
5. Input text
6. Verify x icon
Title: x icon displayed when inputting
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when inputting text

Step:
7. Press Backspace
8. Verify text removed
Title: Backspace removes text
Expectation: - SHOULD remove text when pressing Backspace

Step:
7. Click x icon
8. Verify text removed and full list shown
Title: x icon removes text and shows full list
Expectation: - SHOULD remove search input and show back the full list when clicking x icon

Step:
5. Input 1 character
6. Verify search starts
Title: search starts from 1 char
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from 1 character

Step:
5. Input keyword matching title or message
6. Verify search results
Title: search based on title and message
Expectation: - SHOULD return all saved responses where either title or message field contains the search keyword

Title: case-insensitive and partial matching
Expectation: - SHOULD match case-insensitive and partial, validating if keyword appears anywhere within either field

Step:
5. Input keyword with no match
6. Verify no results message
Title: Search results (0) when no match
Expectation: - SHOULD show Search results (0) below Search box when no results found

Step:
5. Input keyword with matches
6. Verify results count
Title: Search results count displayed
Expectation: - SHOULD show Search results ({number_of_matched_results}) below Search box when matching results found

Title: results list displayed same as AC2
Expectation: - SHOULD show list of results same as AC2

Step: 7. Verify default selection
Title: first result selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first result to view by default

Step: 7. Verify pagination in search results
Title: search results load 20 items
Expectation: - SHOULD load every 20 items in search results

Step:
8. Scroll down in search results
9. Verify Load more
Title: Load more in search results
Expectation: - SHOULD display Load more and get next 20 items when user scrolls down in search results

Step:

Expectation: - SHOULD show submenu containing Edit response and Delete response options

6. Input all character types in TITLE

Expectation: - SHOULD show MESSAGE field empty by default with placeholder Write the full message you want to send to clilents

6. Input any characters in MESSAGE

6. Attempt text formatting in MESSAGE

Expectation: - SHOULD clear text-formatting when pasting a text paragraph in MESSAGE field

6. Input characters in MESSAGE

Expectation: - SHOULD cut off and paste the first 10,000 characters when pasting text over 10,000 characters in MESSAGE field

Expectation: - SHOULD show Save button disabled by default

Step:

Expectation: - SHOULD enable Save button if having input in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields

8. Click X button
9. Verify popup closes

Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup when clicking X button

Step:
8. Click Cancel button

Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup when clicking Cancel button

Step:
8. Click Save button

Title: Save button adds response and shows toast
Expectation: - SHOULD add a new saved response to the list and display toast New Saved Response created.

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chat box by selecting an item in Saved Response popup

5. Verify chatbox
Title: message appended to chatbox on title click
Expectation: - SHOULD append the full message content into the chatbox, placing it behind the current text if any

Step:
4. Select a saved response item
5. Press Enter key
6. Verify chatbox
Title: message appended to chatbox on Enter
Expectation: - SHOULD append the full message content into the chatbox when pressing Enter

US: US2: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to create a saved response from a message in the conversation, so that I add a new saved response quicker
AC: AC1: Add Save this response button to Coach's non-text message
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to Inbox conversation with existing Coach messages
3. Hover over a non-text message of the Coach
4. Verify button
Title: Save this response button between 3-dot and Reply
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save this response button between 3-dot and Reply buttons for Coach's non-text message

Step:
5. Hover over Save this response button
6. Verify tooltip
Title: tooltip Saved this response
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip Saved this response when hovering the button

Step: 5. Verify button visibility condition
Title: button shown only on paid-plan workspaces
Expectation: - SHOULD show Save this response button only if workspace is in paid-plan including Saved Response feature (Pro, Studio plan)

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to Inbox conversation with existing Coach messages
3. Hover over a non-text message of the Coach
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify popup
Title: Add To Saved Responses popup displayed
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup with title Add To Saved Responses

Title: TITLE field blank
Expectation: - SHOULD leave TITLE field blank

Title: MESSAGE field pre-populated with Coach's message
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate the MESSAGE field with Coach's message

Step: 6. Verify MESSAGE truncation for long messages
Title: MESSAGE truncates to 10,000 characters
Expectation: - SHOULD cut the first 10,000 characters of the message to be filled in MESSAGE field if Coach's message is over 10,000 characters

Step:
6. Fill in TITLE field
7. Click Save button
8. Verify response saved and toast shown
Title: Save adds response and shows toast
Expectation: - SHOULD add that message as a new saved response and show toast Response has been saved
